name: Terravore
description: Araignée colossale de pierre dont les pattes foreuses percent le sol comme du papier. Elle crée des pièges sismiques en vidant le sous-sol sous les cités ennemies.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, epic scale. A colossal arachnid creature made of volcanic rock and obsidian, with eight massive drill-like legs boring into the earth. Its body is a craggy mountain of dark stone with glowing magma cracks. Multiple pupilless eyes of different sizes glow red and orange beneath a rocky carapace. Dust clouds, fractured ground, ruins sinking beneath it. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
